send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

DreamCloud: Love your mattress? Upgrade your guest room! Save up to 50% + $100 off memory foam models. 4 days only! 

https://dreamcloud.attn.tv/aGBX4aef0LLb

DreamCloud: Hi, this is Sam. Thanks for stopping by! Mattresses are up to 50% off, so now's a great time to upgrade. https://dreamcloud.attn.tv/acthl5-hWyRR

Questions? Text us back!

Sam...I bought a mattress from your company several years ago. It came in a box so torn up and taped together I knew it was used.😢It was already worn down on one edge and I didn't bother to return it because it was just too much trouble to bother with...I paid the full price and was so disappointed. No need to send another message. Your company should be ashamed.

promotions.title: Mother's day
content:
SAVE $50 OFF The Bartesian Cocktail Maker for Mother's day until May 12th:
https://bartesian.com/products/cocktail-maker

promotions.title: Holiday Collection 2024 - 11/5/24
content:
Product Description:
•The best way for you and your holiday guests to get in the spirit of the season is with this year’s Bartesian Holiday Collection. This limited edition variety pack contains 2 each of 4 curated seasonal cocktails:

•Clausmopolitan: A shimmering holiday twist on the classic cranberry, lime, and orange vodka cocktail.
•Santa-gria: A festive rum-based fusion of red wine, zesty lime, triple sec, and aromatic cinnamon.
•Holiday Spiced Old Fashioned: A seasonal twist with orange, bitters, cinnamon, and holiday spices.
•Peary Christmas: An elegant tequila cocktail with sweet pear, citrus, and delicate almond flavors.

Seasonal limited-time offer.

Available at bartesian.com/products/holiday-collection-2024

promotions.title: Holiday offer
content: Deal: $50 off any Bartesian machine - Dates: Wednesday, December 4 - Tuesday, December 31

promotions.title: Festive Collection 2024 - 11/5/24
content:
Product Description:
• Get into the festive spirit with this year’s Bartesian Festive Collection. 
• This limited edition variety pack features merry cocktails across two spirit types, perfect for the Bartesian Duet:

• Bee Merry: A sweet and sour tequila cocktail with tart cranberry, herbal thyme, and warm honey flavors.
• Mistletoe Margarita: A blend of juicy pomegranate and lime, balanced with triple sec and holiday spices.
• The Grinch Appletini: Sweet and tart with crisp green apple flavor.
• Winter White Cosmo: Tart and sweet with white cranberry, zesty lime, and floral elderflower.

• Seasonal limited-time offer.

Available at bartesian.com/products/festive-collection-2024

promotions.title: BFCM
content: Deal: $100 off the machine with $400+ in cart - Dates: Friday, November 1 - Tuesday, December 3

promotions.title: Subscribe and Save 20%
content:
When people ask about subscriptions OR if they're asking for discounts send them to https://bartesian.com/a/account/custom-tools/dynamic-box?product=7878623756487

When people subscribe, they can receive up to 20% off any of our Bartesian capsules, 50% off accessories and always receive free shipping on their subscription orders.

promotions.title: Naughty Collection 2024 - 11/5/24
content:
Product Description:
This kind of naughty will land you on everyone's nice list! Get into the festive spirit with the Bartesian Naughty Collection. This limited-edition variety pack includes 2 each of 4 merry holiday cocktails:

•Holly Hibiscus Sour: A fruity, floral tequila cocktail with hibiscus, mint, and tangy lemon.
•The Grinch Appletini: A sweet and tart cocktail with crisp green apple flavor.
•Frosty's Bananas Foster: An indulgent whiskey drink with caramelized banana, burnt sugar, and vanilla.
•Santa-gria: A festive rum-based fusion of red wine, lime, triple sec, and cinnamon.
Seasonal Limited-Time Edition.

Seasonal limited-time edition. 
URL: https://bartesian.com/products/naughty-collection-2024

coupons.name: TEST Email & SMS Sign up 10% OFF

send_to_cs: ➜ If there are still issues send to CS
drive_to_purchase: Unless cx specifies, default to recommending "The Bartesian Cocktail Maker"
journey_replies_process: The automated journey will ask the customer if they were satisfied with the product:
➜ If the customer answers "No" an automated message will ask them what went wrong - when they respond use temp "Journey 1" and ESC
➜ If the customer answers "Yes" an automated message will ask them what they liked - when they respond use temp "Journey 2" only
For the journey where customers are asked what is their preferred spirit:
➜ If they answer incorrectly/multiple answers - send the template for the spirit they select
➜If they answer with multiple options - edit/combine the templates

conversation.message_text:
Bartesian: Final hours to get game day ready.

Order the Big Game Bundle by midnight for delivery by kickoff. bartesian.attn.tv/aQEwmLt85avm
Bartesian: Need help choosing a Bartesian machine? See it in action and compare models here: https://bartesian.attn.tv/aKyys-TIRia2
Bartesian: Thanks for your recent purchase! Have you checked out our newest cocktail releases? Find your favorites: https://bartesian.attn.tv/agA8Wx_hTaWT
Bartesian: Your Bartesian is waiting... Shop now: https://bartesian.attn.tv/a1OnOV7Qxl1d & Sign up for our cocktail subscription to save up to 35% now.
Bartesian: National Margarita Day: Celebrate with the Pro Essentials Bundle for the same price as the Pro Cocktail Maker alone. bartesian.attn.tv/aESNNc47XfKE
Bartesian: Save on every sip with a subscription! Up to 20% off cocktails, 50% off accessories & free shipping: https://bartesian.attn.tv/aH0NfCrzcYdG
I have a question about my order and the price of someone is around?
Bartesian: Hi! How can I help you?

I have a reorder coming up, the date is soon, I made a few changes to it, want to make sure they were made and how come it is a little more than before? It was like $84 before and now it's over $95!! I'm hoping you can help me get it back to the original price point!!
Bartesian: Thanks for reaching out, and I understand your concern. Are you referring to Order #2309110 from January 30th? I see the order total is $85.96. Did you have another order after this one?

I mean my next subscription order to be shipped for February!! It said $10 more for the same amount of product!! so will it also be $85.96? Plus did the substitutions of Espresso Martin and Apple Pie were made in place of Lemon drop and regular Margarita?
Bartesian: Thanks for clarifying! I'd have to double-check that with my team for you due to my system being limited. To proceed, can I please have your email address?
Michael.dicroce@gnbvt.edu how long will it take for you to get an answer? If your phone number worked weekends, there wouldn't be a problem, but they Fontana would like an answer asap please!!

Bartesian: Thank you for sharing these details. I've passed this along to my team for review and will follow up as soon as I have an update.

While I don't have a specific timeframe just yet, please know our team is working to review all inquiries as quickly as possible. We'll be in touch soon.

Let's be honest, it will be Monday, since no one works weekends with this company!! My order will renew this weekend, I have questions about the price and the product!! How does this work? I was told it will be automatic, how do I know what you charge and ship? How can you not be a 7 day a week company, I do t get it!! Or at least have you guys have access to someone all 7 days!
Bartesian: I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. I'm still waiting for a response from my team, but I'll reach out the moment I hear back from them!

Disclaimer:
Extra 10% off select vacuums, PuriCare air purifiers, TONE Free headphones and XBOOM Go wireless speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. Offer valid for one-time use only within 30 days of code being sent. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. No adjustments to prior purchases and non-redeemable for cash.
Qualifying Vacuums: A905RM, A907GMS, A927KGMS, A927KVMS, A908VMR, A929KVM, R975GM1

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

conversation.message_text: LG Electronics USA: Welcome to LG Electronics USA! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Text back with any questions!
LG Electronics USA: Texts may be retained for customer support & other purposes. For more info, see Terms (lg.com/us/legal) and Privacy (lg.com/us/privacy)
